sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, haystack String, token String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'This is a test string.', 'test');
UPDATE test_strings SET token = 'string' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull('A quick brown fox','fox') AS is_present;
